name: command
description: A searchable command palette whose grouped items are filtered SERVER-SIDE: the query binds l:model.debounce, the server re-filters + re-groups the catalog and re-renders the list (no client filtering). The chosen value lives server-side and is set via the $set magic action. Often composed inside a dialog wire (a command-dialog). Server-first WIRE component (ADR-0012); replaces the <lv-command> Lit island. WAI-ARIA combobox + listbox with grouped options.
docs: Register CommandComponent as a PROTOTYPE-scoped @Bean (a fresh instance per stateless wire call). Seed `allItems` from your available commands (the seed list is placeholder data). The query filters server-side via l:model.debounce; selecting an item sets the `selected` field via $set('selected', '<value>'). Read `selected` in a @LievitRender hook (or a dedicated action) to act on the choice. For a command-dialog, render the component inside a dialog wire's owned body region. Adjust the template name freely once copied (the source is yours).
